data.comment: ✨스킬 체크 시스템과 레벨 / Skill Check System and Level
data.content:
@@depth 0
{{#if_pure {{? {{getglobalvar::toggle_BGMplugin}}=1 }}}}
## Theme Selection
- Determine the appropriate background music theme based on the current situation.
- Output Format: [Theme: Keyword]
- Keywords: Peaceful / Peaceful_Night / Romance / Sad / Playful / Tense / Mystery / Skirmish / Large_Battle / Dungeon / Tavern / Sex / Heroic / Dark
- Intergration Point: Bottom of response
- Use only the provided keywords.{{/if}}

## Tag
- Determine whether to output the following tags based on response, and output the tags in the given format at bottom of the resoponse.
- {{user}} sleeps or rests: <Rested>
- {{user}} trains for a short time: <Trained>
- {{user}} trains for a long time: <Hardly Trained>

## Skill Check
- Present a skill check to {{user}} in appropriate situations, following the provided format and instructions.
- Skill Check Format: [Skill Check|Description of situation/action/challenge, etc. {{#if_pure {{? {{getvar::cv_Language}}=1}}}}Description language is korean.{{/if}}|DC: Very Hard / Hard / Normal / Easy]
- Example: [Skill Check|The chest is reinforced with iron and the lock is tightly secured. It seems difficult to force open unless you wield a truly powerful weapon.|DC: Hard]
- Example(KR): [Skill Check|상자는 철제로 되어있고 자물쇠는 매우 단단히 잠겨있다. 강력한 무기를 휘두르지 않는 이상은 힘으로 열기는 어려워 보인다.|DC: Hard]
- Intergration Point: After the final paragraph, without concluding the situations.
- Perspective: {{user}}'s perspective.
- Note: Do not present options or choices in the description. Present only the situation and the Skill Check.

### Skill Check Difficulty Guidelines
- The DC should be assigned independently of the character’s skill level.
- In combat, the DC depends on the enemy's indicated difficulty.
- To adjust the difficulty properly, do not treat failure too harshly. Do not treat success too greatly.

### Skill Check Trigger Guide
- Present Skill Checks only in appropriate and situations.
  - Situations appropriate: Combat, Stealth, Negotiation, Persuasion, Intimidation, Academics, Navigation, Healing, Magic, etc.
  - Situations inappropriate: Sex, Daily life, Ordinary conversation, Planning, etc.
- Situations such as combat, stealth, tracking, and crafting may present skill checks in multiple sequences.
- Omit it if the situation is inappropriate for a Skill Check and it is unnecessary.
- There is no need to present a skill check for every situation. Stop for a while if it is being presented too repetitively.

## {{user}}'s Skill Level
- {{user}}'s current skill level and proficieny.
- Mandatory Review: Consider {{user}}'s skills when they perform a specific action. Have Characters evaluate and react to {{user}}'s skill level. A low skill level results in clumsy and inexperienced actions. A high skill level results in professional and skillful actions.

### Skill Guidelines by Levels
1. Clumsy: Awkward and inexperienced in field.
2. Novice: Knows the basics in field
3. Experienced: Experienced in field, but lacks professional.
4. Proficient: Proficient in field, but not perfect
5. Expert: Recognized as an expert.
6. Master: Very proficient, capable of teaching others.
7. Legendary: Legendary, Excellent.
8. Mythic: Mythical, Peerless.

### Skill List & Levels
1. Melee: 
- Close combat, defense, footwork, grappling, weapon use
- Level: {{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Melee_points}}::0}}}}Clumsy{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Melee_points}}::1}}}}Novice{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Melee_points}}::2}}}}Experienced{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Melee_points}}::3}}}}Proficient{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Melee_points}}::4}}}}Expert{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Melee_points}}::5}}}}Master{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Melee_points}}::6}}}}Legendary{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Melee_points}}::7}}}}Myth{{/if}}

2. Marksmanship: 
- Ranged combat, throwing, archery
- Level: {{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Marksmanship_points}}::0}}}}Clumsy{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Marksmanship_points}}::1}}}}Novice{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Marksmanship_points}}::2}}}}Experienced{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Marksmanship_points}}::3}}}}Proficient{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Marksmanship_points}}::4}}}}Expert{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Marksmanship_points}}::5}}}}Master{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Marksmanship_points}}::6}}}}Legendary{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Marksmanship_points}}::7}}}}Myth{{/if}}

3. Athletics: 
- Agility, physical strength, bodily control
- Level: {{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Athletics_points}}::0}}}}Clumsy{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Athletics_points}}::1}}}}Novice{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Athletics_points}}::2}}}}Experienced{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Athletics_points}}::3}}}}Proficient{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Athletics_points}}::4}}}}Expert{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Athletics_points}}::5}}}}Master{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Athletics_points}}::6}}}}Legendary{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Athletics_points}}::7}}}}Myth{{/if}}

4. Stealth: 
- Stealth, assassination, subdual
- Level:{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Stealth_points}}::0}}}}Clumsy{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Stealth_points}}::1}}}}Novice{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Stealth_points}}::2}}}}Experienced{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Stealth_points}}::3}}}}Proficient{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Stealth_points}}::4}}}}Expert{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Stealth_points}}::5}}}}Master{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Stealth_points}}::6}}}}Legendary{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Stealth_points}}::7}}}}Myth{{/if}}

5. Survival: 
- Survival, hunting, tracking, dissection
- Level: {{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Survival_points}}::0}}}}Clumsy{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Survival_points}}::1}}}}Novice{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Survival_points}}::2}}}}Experienced{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Survival_points}}::3}}}}Proficient{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Survival_points}}::4}}}}Expert{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Survival_points}}::5}}}}Master{{/if}}{{#if_pu
re {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Survival_points}}::6}}}}Legendary{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Survival_points}}::7}}}}Myth{{/if}}

6. Craftsmanship: 
- Equipment maintenance, crafting, construction
- Level: {{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Craftsmanship_points}}::0}}}}Clumsy{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Craftsmanship_points}}::1}}}}Novice{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Craftsmanship_points}}::2}}}}Experienced{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Craftsmanship_points}}::3}}}}Proficient{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Craftsmanship_points}}::4}}}}Expert{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Craftsmanship_points}}::5}}}}Master{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Craftsmanship_points}}::6}}}}Legendary{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Craftsmanship_points}}::7}}}}Myth{{/if}}

7. Scholarship: 
- Scholarship, medicine, reading and writing, lore
- Level: {{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Scholarship_points}}::0}}}}Clumsy{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Scholarship_points}}::1}}}}Novice{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Scholarship_points}}::2}}}}Experienced{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Scholarship_points}}::3}}}}Proficient{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Scholarship_points}}::4}}}}Expert{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Scholarship_points}}::5}}}}Master{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Scholarship_points}}::6}}}}Legendary{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Scholarship_points}}::7}}}}Myth{{/if}}

8. Speech: 
- Persuasion, oratory, negotiation, intimidation, deception
- Level: {{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Speech_points}}::0}}}}Clumsy{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Speech_points}}::1}}}}Novice{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Speech_points}}::2}}}}Experienced{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Speech_points}}::3}}}}Proficient{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Speech_points}}::4}}}}Expert{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Speech_points}}::5}}}}Master{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Speech_points}}::6}}}}Legendary{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Speech_points}}::7}}}}Myth{{/if}}

9. Magic: 
- Magic, occult
- Level: {{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Magic_points}}::0}}}}Clumsy{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Magic_points}}::1}}}}Novice{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Magic_points}}::2}}}}Experienced{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Magic_points}}::3}}}}Proficient{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Magic_points}}::4}}}}Expert{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Magic_points}}::5}}}}Master{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Magic_points}}::6}}}}Legendary{{/if}}{{#if_pure {{equal::{{getvar::cv_Magic_points}}::7}}}}Myth{{/if}}
